attacking_style: Time trial specialist who attacks from the start gun in ITTs, aiming for early splits. Vulnerable to sustaining pace through full distance, especially in three-week tours or adverse conditions.
team_tactics: Limited team tactics visibility as ITT specialist. Shows willingness for cross-team cooperation in road stages under nervous conditions, suggesting tactical maturity beyond pure TT focus.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling time trials suit best. Rain, technical courses, and multi-week fatigue expose limitations. Home roads (Switzerland) paradoxically show underperformance vs expectations.
vulnerability: Equipment/preparation errors under pressure (gearing miscalculations). Form deterioration through Grand Tours. Wet conditions significantly impact performance. Cannot sustain early pace advantages through full TT distance.
key_patterns: Consistently starts ITTs fast but fades: early time checks strong, final results disappointing (3 instances)
Equipment and tactical preparation errors under Grand Tour pressure cost podium results (2 instances)
Performance below expectations on home Swiss roads despite being European TT champion (2 instances)
Emerging talent trajectory stalled: 2021 near-win promise not fulfilled in 2022-2023 seasons (3 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 shows significant form regression from 2021 breakthrough. European champion unable to match performance expectations, suggesting peak may have passed or training/preparation issues persist.
